stemHtml: A booster or LP compressor in a twin spool turbofan…

options.a: rotates at the same rotor speed as the fan.
options.b: rotates at a rotor speed different from both fan, HP compressor and HP turbine.
options.c: rotates at the same rotor speed as the HP compressor.
options.d: rotates at the same rotor speed as the HP turbine.
